title: Adding "Suggest" access to Monday Docs
excerpt: Is there a way to allow different collaborators on a Monday doc to “suggest” edits without overwriting the original author’s work? We use comments, but it would be nice to have a feature similar to Google Docs

posts.author: BriKHami (Brik )
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to allow different collaborators on a Monday doc to “suggest” edits without overwriting the original author’s work? We use comments, but it would be nice to have a feature similar to Google Docs
